text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An Emperor's absolute perfection is not an easy
ideal to live up to.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
At times, I'm blinded by the sheer brilliance of my
ideals...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But even if it is nigh impossible, I do not wish to
settle for anything less.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I beg you, Trainer. I will endure any labor you
propose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Train me until I can bear this burden!
choice_data_list: Let's take it one step at a time.
Time for the workout of a lifetime!
Time for the workout of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Train me until I can bear this burden!
choice_data_list: Let's take it one step at a time.
Time for the workout of a lifetime!
Time for the workout of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No. I'll never attain perfection by letting my
emotions get the better of me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. I've regained my composure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yet again, you've taught me a valuable lesson.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ha, I would expect nothing less. There's no need
to hold back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If I wish to preach, I must be willing to practice!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My victory must be absolute! My prowess beyond
question!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor—and when I
next take to the track, I will live up to that name!
